title: Routing, Selection, Translation, and Redundancy
description: Connect branch, headquarters, cloud, and internet routes while diagnosing asymmetry and failover. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a routed hybrid branch design while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Read and compare routes by prefix, administrative distance, and metric.
Explain static, dynamic, default, translated, and redundant gateway behavior.
Verify forwarding and return paths with tables and packet evidence.
